Jasper Review (2026): Pricing, Features & Alternatives

An AI writing platform built for marketing teams and brand-consistent content.

MakerJasper AI
CategoryAI Writing Tools
PricingPlans start around $49/mo; no permanent free tier (free trial only)
Free tierNo
WebsiteVisit Jasper →

Best for

Marketing teams needing on-brand copy at scale.

Pros

  • Brand voice training for consistent marketing copy
  • Templates for ads, emails, and landing pages
  • Team collaboration features

Cons

  • No permanent free plan
  • Pricier than general-purpose chatbots for basic writing

Alternatives to Jasper

ChatGPT

The most widely used AI chatbot for writing, research, coding help, and everyday questions.

Claude

An AI assistant known for careful reasoning, long context windows, and strong coding ability.

Copy.ai

AI copywriting tool focused on marketing content and workflow automation.

Grammarly

AI-powered grammar, tone, and clarity checker with a generative writing assistant.
